profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.name: Name
profile.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 255 characters
profile.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
profile.emailMaxLength: Email must be at most 255 characters
profile.emailVerificationResendSuccessDescriptio: Please check your inbox and click the verification link.
profile.emailVerificationResendErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.
profile.emailVerificationSentDescription: We sent a verification link to your new email address. Please click it to finish updating your email.
profile.setEmailWarningDescription: After changing your email, your account will become unverified. You will lose access until you verify the new email address.
profile.errorLoading: We couldn't load your account details right now.
profile.errorLoadingDescription: Please refresh the page or log back in to manage your account settings.
profile.storageUsedDescription: Total size of photos uploaded to your account.
profile.patronCtaDescription: Help keep this project sustainable by becoming a Patron. Starting tier is just $5/month.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.logout: Log out of all other sessions
sessions.description: Manage your active sessions across devices

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your account password. Choose a strong password you don't use elsewhere.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers. To confirm, please type your password below.
deleteAccount.successDescription: Your account has been successfully deleted.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Choose how we contact you and manage device alerts.
notifications.pageDescription: Manage how you receive notifications about important events and updates.
notifications.controlDescription: Control how you receive notifications for different events.

telegram.title: Telegram account
telegram.description: Link your Telegram account to log in via our bot and receive notifications about placement responses and status changes.

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect Telegram account?
disconnectConfirm.description: You will stop receiving Telegram notifications until you connect your account again.

test.error: Failed to send Telegram test notification

device.title: Device notifications
device.description: Enable native OS alerts for in-app activity on this device.

inAppBrowser.warning: You are using an in-app browser (for example, Instagram), where web push notifications are often blocked or unreliable.
inAppBrowser.instructions: Open this page in Safari or Chrome to enable device notifications. In Instagram, tap the menu and choose Open in browser.

copyFeedback.error: Could not copy link. Please copy it manually from the address bar.

status.inAppUnsupported: This in-app browser does not reliably support push notifications. Open this page in Safari or Chrome to continue.
status.telegramMiniAppUnsupported: Telegram Mini App does not reliably support web push notifications. Use Telegram notifications for reliable alerts.
status.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications. Try using a modern browser like Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.
status.blocked: Notifications are blocked. Update your browser settings to allow them.
status.error: Unable to verify device notification status.

errors.notSupported: This browser does not support notifications.
errors.inAppBrowser: Push notifications are not available in this in-app browser. Open the page in Safari or Chrome and try again.
errors.telegramMiniApp: Push notifications are not available in Telegram Mini App. Use Telegram notifications for this account.
errors.swNotReady: Service worker is not ready yet. Please reload the page or install the app before enabling device notifications.
errors.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured for this environment.
errors.permissionDenied: Permission to show notifications was denied.
errors.aborted: Subscription was aborted. Please try again.
errors.serializationFailed: Failed to serialise the push subscription.
errors.registrationFailed: Failed to register push subscription with the server.
errors.swNotReadySimple: Service worker is not ready yet.
errors.unsubscriptionFailed: Failed to remove push subscription from browser.
errors.statusCheckFailed: Unable to determine device notification status.

device.telegramMiniAppHint: You are using Telegram Mini App. Device push notifications may not work here; use Telegram notifications below instead.

contactUs.title: Contact Support
contactUs.description: Need help? Start a conversation with our support team.

helperProfiles.createError: Failed to create helper profile. Please try again.
helperProfiles.updateError: Failed to update helper profile. Please try again.
